parameters: "I don't have any business down there anymore!"
"I think I just saw a naked woman..."
"It’d be nice if I could use the fire escape…but I guess things don’t go that
"I don't have any business down there anymore!"
"I don't have any business down there anymore!"
That delivery guy’s going upstairs too, so I’ll get caught!”
That delivery guy’s going upstairs too, so I’ll get caught!”
That delivery guy’s going upstairs too, so I’ll get caught!”
It’s not even the floor I live on… If I run into someone again, it’ll be bad!”
Why am I stuck going down the stairs wearing this…!?"
"I mean, not many people really use the stairs, do they?
It could even be safer than riding the elevator…"
"Damn... I should've just waited for the elevator..."
"No kidding, deliveries above the 10th floor are rough on the knees… sigh…"
(Seriously, just take the elevator!! It’s right there!!)
"Ughhh…Why is it that weird stuff only happens at the worst times…!"
"…S-still no sign that they’ve spotted me…
I have to look for another way before they get here…"
\# Find a way so the delivery person won't spot you!
\# (Only 20 seconds until the delivery person gets to the top of the stairs)
"Ahh! What should I do, what should I do!
There’s literally nowhere I can hide!!"
"Ugh, I’m beat…! Time to take a quick break here──"
There’s a—um!—a good reason for this…!"
Seriously... it’s really frustrating, isn’t it..."
He's staring…! He's seeing me fully naked…!)
"Oh… um… well, I’m in a hurry right now…!"
I guess I can’t use delivery anymore for a while…!)
"No, it’s because some gum was stuck to your butt…"
(I was just in the bath moments ago! No way would there be gum stuck on my butt…
I think I was pressing against the walls quite a lot…)
(W-well, even then… what were you thinking, suddenly touching a strangers butt…?
"Fwaah…♡ Hah, mmm…! Uh, if you’re removing it, please be quick… nn!"
"Hang on a little longer… it’s not coming off that easily…"
(Damn… I somehow touched her behind during the commotion…And she’s so beautiful…
(There’s no gum anywhere… might as well indulge a little longer…)
(W-wait, the way he’s touching me is way too naughty…!
This guy…! Saying there’s gum stuck on me… that’s gotta be a lie…)
"W-wait a sec…! N-no…! T-that doesn’t have anything to do with it…!"
"Don’t worry, sometimes trash sticks in these kinds of holes too."
"Nnngh⁉…♡ N-no, not there…! Hii…! ♡ D-don’t trace over it…!"
(Wait…? Huh? The emergency exit here is unlocked──)
(Seriously, your voice is so sexy... you’re way too sensitive.)
(Haven’t you noticed you’ve been rubbing your thighs together this whole time?
If you’re this easy, even going all the way wouldn’t be──)
"Huh? Who the hell is interrupting me right when things are getting good…?"
\{ "Hey, newbie! How long are you spending on just one package?!"
Don’t tell me you’re slacking off..."
"Ah… hahaha! Of course I did! It’s just that the elevator was out of order…!"
"Huh!? Who the hell do you think you’re talking to?!"
"Eh!? No, that’s not it…! I was talking to senpai just now…!"
